summary: This page transitions from expressing sinusoids using trigonometric identities and Euler’s formula to the beginning of Section B.3 on sketching signals. It introduces representations of cosine and sine in exponential form, then starts discussing monotonic exponentials, explaining the decay and growth of e^{-at} and e^{at} and defining the time constant as 1/a.

figures.caption: Phasor addition of sinusoids in Example B.6.
